titles.title: Machine Learning Applications in Healthcare: A Comprehensive Review

record.abstract: This comprehensive review examines the current state of machine learning applications in healthcare settings. We analyzed 150 studies published between 2020-2023, focusing on diagnostic imaging, drug discovery, and personalized treatment plans. Our findings indicate significant promise in these areas, though challenges remain in data privacy, algorithm transparency, and clinical integration.

titles.title: Deep Learning in Medical Image Analysis: Current Trends and Future Directions

record.abstract: Medical image analysis has been revolutionized by deep learning techniques. This systematic review analyzes 200 papers from 2019-2023 focusing on convolutional neural networks, transformers, and generative models. We found that deep learning achieves state-of-the-art performance in radiology, pathology, and ophthalmology applications.
